name: Literate Foundation
shortDescription: Basic literate education for scribes, scholars, clerks, and formal learners.

name: Civic Learning
shortDescription: Formal literate office, law, and rhetorical culture.

name: Sacred Learning
shortDescription: Priestly, doctrinal, and ritual-intellectual training.

name: Mercantile Practice
shortDescription: Practical trade, bargaining, and valuation training.

name: Commercial Administration
shortDescription: Record-heavy office and mercantile administration training.

name: Courtly Formation
shortDescription: Basic training in elite manners, rank, and ceremonial conduct.

name: Political Acumen
shortDescription: Reading people, factions, and elite social situations.
notes: Source group: Empathy / Etiquette / Operations overlap.

name: Healing Practice
shortDescription: Practical organized healing and immediate care.

name: Herb and Remedy Craft
shortDescription: Plant, remedy, and poison-related healing knowledge.

name: Maritime Crew Training
shortDescription: Basic sailor and working seamanship training.

name: Maritime Navigation
shortDescription: Advanced maritime route-finding.

name: Animal Husbandry
shortDescription: Practical stock, herd, and animal-working training.

name: Mounted Service
shortDescription: Riding and mounted practical service training.

name: Transport and Caravan Work
shortDescription: Overland freight and movement.

name: Covert Entry
shortDescription: Burglary, stealth entry, and covert access skills.

name: Street Theft
shortDescription: Urban theft and covert carry.
notes: Source group: Sleight of Hand / Stealth overlap.

name: Trap and Intrusion Work
shortDescription: Technical intrusion and trap-handling.

name: Fieldcraft Stealth
shortDescription: Rural stealth, concealment, and ambush skills.

name: Athletic Conditioning
shortDescription: General movement and body-control training.

name: Social Reading
shortDescription: Interpersonal judgment and emotional awareness.

name: Performance Basics
shortDescription: Broad entertainer and expressive performance package.

name: Formal Performance
shortDescription: Elite, staged, or formal speaking/performance training.

name: Mental Discipline
shortDescription: Trained inner control and focus.
notes: Formation group, not always a default profession core. Source group: Meta-Cognition.

name: Technical Measurement
shortDescription: Practical technical, surveying, and measurement training.
notes: Source group: Engineering / Physical Science overlap.

name: Learned Natural Inquiry
shortDescription: Advanced scientific and scholarly investigation.

name: Omen and Ritual Practice
shortDescription: Practical divinatory and ritual-interpretive training.

name: Basic Melee Training
shortDescription: One melee attack skill plus Dodge and Parry.
notes: Choose one melee attack skill in addition to the listed skills.

name: Advanced Melee Training
shortDescription: Two related melee attack skills plus Dodge and Parry.
notes: Choose two related melee attack skills in addition to the listed skills.

name: Basic Missile Training
shortDescription: One missile attack skill plus Dodge and Perception.
notes: Choose one missile attack skill in addition to the listed skills.

name: Advanced Missile Training
shortDescription: Broader trained ranged-combat package.
notes: Choose one main missile skill and one secondary missile or fallback skill in addition to the listed skills.

name: Defensive Soldiering
shortDescription: Defensive discipline and line-fighting package.

name: Mounted Warrior Training
shortDescription: Proper mounted combat package.

name: Field Soldiering
shortDescription: Practical field-combat adaptation package.
notes: Choose one attack skill in addition to the listed skills.

name: Veteran Soldiering
shortDescription: Hardened battlefield survival and veteran composure package.

name: Officer Training
shortDescription: Battlefield leadership and control package.

name: Veteran Leadership
shortDescription: Seasoned military command under pressure.
